features.description: Top-1 probability of the accepted previous candidate.
features.name: previous_top1_confidence

features.description: Top-1 minus top-2 probability of the accepted previous candidate.
features.name: previous_top1_margin

features.description: Entropy of the accepted previous distribution divided by log(C).
features.name: previous_normalized_entropy

features.description: Top-1 probability of the new raw candidate.
features.name: new_top1_confidence

features.description: Top-1 minus top-2 probability of the new raw candidate.
features.name: new_top1_margin

features.description: Entropy of the new raw distribution divided by log(C).
features.name: new_normalized_entropy

features.description: Whether previous and new candidates predict the same class.
features.name: same_top1_class

features.description: New distribution probability assigned to the previous top-1 class.
features.name: new_probability_of_previous_class

features.description: Previous distribution probability assigned to the new top-1 class.
features.name: previous_probability_of_new_class

features.description: One-based destination timestep divided by T.
features.name: normalized_timestep
